declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers and a retainer, corresponding to 6.66 Kg.
note: This EPD follows PCR 2023:03 and reports results in Upstream/Core/Downstream modules rather than the standard EN 15804 A1-A3 production stage, so no A1-A3 GWP values can be extracted directly. For reference, GWP-fossil totals 5.36E+01, GWP-biogenic 0.00E+00, and GWP-total 5.37E+01 kg CO2 eq. (cradle-to-grave) per declared bearing unit (6.66 kg); Upstream-only GWP-fossil is 3.72E+01 and GWP-total 3.69E+01. These are not equivalent to A1-A3.
